title: Changes to the bowel cancer screening programme standards from 1 April 2025
body: "Introduction   These revised screening standards for the NHS bowel cancer screening programme replace previous versions. They apply for data collected from 1 April 2025.  Summary of changes  BCSP-S01 FOBt coverage   Minor wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Change to thresholds   BCSP-S02 FOBt uptake   Minor wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Change to thresholds Minor reporting changes   BCSP-S03 FOBt uptake inequalities standard (new)   Same as BCSP-S02, except calculated for deciles 1 and 2 (/ quintile 1) Reporting changes and development   Previously BCSP-S03 related to FOBt test kit turnaround time, but this has now moved to BCSP-S04.  BCSP-S04 FOBt kit turnaround time   Minor wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Change to thresholds Minor reporting changes   Previously BCSP-04 related to bowel scope, which has now been removed.  BCSP-S05 FOBt CTC usage   Minor wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Clarification added on why there are no performance thresholds Minor reporting changes   BCSP-S06 FOBt time to first offered SSP   Major change to the definition: counting number of days from referral up to and including the first offered date, which means 1 less day for the standard (to be in line with other standard calculations) Change to thresholds Reporting changes and development   BCSP-S07 FOBt time to first offered diagnostic test   Minor wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Change to thresholds Minor reporting changes   BCSP-S08 FOBt time through pathway, 28day standard (new)   Major development to create a new report   Previously BCSP-S08 presented time from diagnostic test referral to attendance. The new standard now shows time through whole pathway following a test kit result of ‘further tests needed’.  BCSP-S09 pathology turnaround times   Wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Change to account for R&D strategy Change to include all programme arms Thresholds maintained Reporting changes and development   BCSP-S10 proportion helpline calls answered   Major change to the data source from BT dataset to hub call systems Inclusion of all programme calls Major reporting changes and development   BCSP-S11 FOBt diagnostic test uptake   Minor wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Thresholds maintained Minor reporting changes   BCSP-S12 FOBt serrated polyp and adenoma detection rate   Major change to the definition to include serrated polyps Change to account for R&D strategy Change to thresholds Major reporting changes and development   BCSP-S13 caecal intubation rate   Wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Change to include all programme arms Thresholds maintained Reporting changes and development   BCSP-S14 scope withdrawal time   Major definition change from ‘complete colonoscopy with a ‘normal’ (NAD) outcome’ to ‘complete colonoscopy where no therapy was performed’ Change to include all programme arms Thresholds maintained Major reporting changes and development   BCSP-S15 polyp retrieval rate   Wording adjustments to make the definition clearer Change to account for implementation of R&D strategy Change to include all programme arms Change to thresholds Reporting changes and development  "
